libretube.name: LibreTube
libretube.description: Alternative YouTube frontend for Android, privacy-respecting, no ads.

newpipe.name: NewPipe
newpipe.description: Lightweight YouTube frontend with downloads and background playback.

grayjay.name: Grayjay
grayjay.description: Unified media frontend for YouTube, Twitch, podcasts.

seal.name: Seal
seal.description: Frontend for yt-dlp on Android for media downloading (advanced users).

aurora_store.name: Aurora Store
aurora_store.description: Anonymous Play Store client without Google account.

obtanium.name: Obtainium
obtanium.description: Track and auto-update apps directly from GitHub/F-Droid sources.

droidify.name: Droid-ify
droidify.description: Modern F-Droid client with faster UI and better UX.

netguard.name: NetGuard
netguard.description: No-root firewall with per-app network control.

tracker_control.name: TrackerControl
tracker_control.description: Detects and blocks trackers inside apps.

rethink_dns.name: RethinkDNS
rethink_dns.description: DNS + firewall + anti-tracking in one app.

invizible_pro.name: InviZible Pro
invizible_pro.description: Tor + DNSCrypt + firewall stack for anonymity.

aegis.name: Aegis Authenticator
aegis.description: Encrypted 2FA app with backups and biometrics.

signal.name: Signal
signal.description: End-to-end encrypted messaging with minimal metadata.

molly.name: Molly
molly.description: Hardened privacy fork of Signal for advanced users.

vlc.name: VLC for Android
vlc.description: Universal media player, supports all formats.

scrambled_exif.name: Scrambled Exif
scrambled_exif.description: Removes metadata from images before sharing.

open_camera.name: Open Camera
open_camera.description: Open-source camera app with manual controls.
